findings.problem: The chapter's major turn (Ina accepts expanded authority and deeper complicity) is structurally undercut by an immediate tactical win at the end. The rapid kill-order success creates relief too quickly and blunts the consequence promised by the chapter spine.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise fallout across snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:383-439 so the signature at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:393 produces an immediate cost she cannot neutralize in-scene. Keep the authority gain, but make the first mitigation move in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:421-435 produce partial failure, delayed effect, or collateral exposure instead of clean closure.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised passage at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:391-439 contains at least one explicit irreversible negative outcome that remains unresolved at chapter end; FAIL if the closing beat still resolves as a clean operational save equivalent to the current confirmation at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:435.

findings.problem: Sanitization/moral-safety-valve drift: Ina makes a dark choice, then the narrative immediately supplies competence-and-compassion reassurance (successful emergency retire plus discretionary payout), which softens the discomfort instead of forcing the reader to sit in contamination.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the post-signing sequence at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:393-437 so it preserves causal accountability without immediate absolution. Strategy options: delay the kill-switch effect; show one courier or household already hit before reroute; or make the payout itself compromise source safety. Keep concrete physical/emotional consequence in the scene-level rendering, not summary.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:393-437 includes a concrete unresolved harm with embodied consequence and no same-scene action that fully cancels it; FAIL if the revised ending again provides immediate moral stabilization through successful mitigation plus compensation.

findings.problem: A recurring atmospheric formula (location + smelled/smelling + odor list) appears three times, creating a detectable prose tic and flattening texture variety.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise at least one of snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:3, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:199, or snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:419 to shift sensory channel (sound, touch, spatial pressure) and sentence shape, while preserving setting continuity.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, across snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:3, 199, and 419, no more than two paragraphs use the current smell-led list construction and at least one is recast through a different sensory frame; FAIL if all three retain the same smell-list template.

findings.problem: Three consecutive case entries use near-identical header syntax (route cluster + payload marker + victim record), which reads as mechanical report output and reduces tonal modulation at a critical emotional hinge.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rebuild the run at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:191-196 so only one entry keeps full protocol formatting; vary the other two through distinct syntax (for example, one filtered through Ina's immediate bodily reaction and one through witness-note voice) while retaining key factual data.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:191-196, at least two of the three entries begin with different syntactic openings and one contains a human-voice fragment or immediate focalized reaction; FAIL if all three remain protocol-header clones.

summary: Narrative tense and continuity alignment are stable, and core character voices (Ina/Minjae/Kwon) remain mostly consistent with the style bible, with contractions used naturally in spoken pressure. The chapter fails on unresolved structural/craft consequence: the complicity turn is quickly cushioned by an immediate operational win, and prose shows repeat-formula drift in both atmospheric setup and case-entry construction.
